name: First Step
description: Purchase your first game on UAP.

name: Game Collector
description: Own 5 or more games in your library.

name: Dedicated Gamer
description: Log a total of 10 hours across all games.

name: Weekend Warrior
description: Log a total of 50 hours across all games.

name: Century Club
description: Log a total of 100 hours across all games.

name: Legendary Hours
description: Log a total of 500 hours across all games.

name: Community Voice
description: Write reviews for 3 or more different games.

name: Forum Regular
description: Create your first post in the community.

name: Scholar
description: Publish a guide to help other players.

name: Bargain Hunter
description: Purchase a game that is currently on sale.

name: Free Loader
description: Add a free-to-play game to your library.

name: Social Butterfly
description: Have 3 or more accepted friends on UAP.

name: Early Adopter
description: One of the first players to join the UAP platform.
